2000000000000000002.INTRO_TITLE: Continental Intelligence Service | Bureau of Records
2000000000000000002.INTRO_DESC:
By decree of the Directorate of Intelligence,
access to sealed records is hereby granted.

All documents remain the property of the Empire,
to be read and amended only under the watchful eyes of the Bureau.

**Imperial Record Console (Ephemeral):** `/record`
• Submit / Amend / Strike Records
• Grant / Revoke Imperial Clearances

**Archives Contained:**
- 📂 Sealed Documents (`.json`)
- 📜 Ciphered Logs (`.txt`)
- 🗄️ Imperial Dossiers (`.dossier`)
2000000000000000002.ROOT_FOOTER: Property of the Empyrean Empire – All access monitored
